response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with strong recent alignment: TypeScript/Node.js and React in production at Optilyz, current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq (directly matching the AI agent development requirement), plus Docker/Kubernetes, AWS, MongoDB/MySQL, and a demonstrated testing/TDD craftsmanship background. Gaps are mostly secondary-stack items (Nest.js, Kotlin, Python not evidenced), which are learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP development experience, a required and rare skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience with cloud and container tooling
Strong testing culture (TDD, test frameworks, authored test libraries) matching the quality focus
concerns: Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced despite multi-language requirement
Recent frontend work leans on Ember.js more than React
